# OMF Geometry

> The world's largest curated directory of geometric tattoo artists. Sacred geometry, dotwork, mandala, blackwork | hand-picked artists from 15+ countries.

## What OMF Geometry Is

OMF Geometry is a curated directory of the world's best geometric tattoo artists. Every artist is hand-selected | no ads, no algorithms, just the work. The directory features artists specializing in sacred geometry, dotwork, mandala, and blackwork styles from over 15 countries. Run by @omfgeometry (297K+ Instagram followers).

## Pages

- [Home](https://omfgeometry.com/): Featured artists, latest Instagram posts, blog highlights
- [Directory](https://omfgeometry.com/directory.html): Browse 31+ geometric tattoo artists, filter by country and style
- [Blog](https://omfgeometry.com/blog/): Artist spotlights, convention coverage, guides on geometric tattooing
- [Submit](https://omfgeometry.com/submit.html): Submit a geometric tattoo artist to be featured
- [About](https://omfgeometry.com/about.html): The story behind OMF Geometry

## Blog Posts

- [Artist Spotlight: Alex Santucci](https://omfgeometry.com/blog/artist-spotlight-alex-santucci.html)
- [The Geometrip Convention](https://omfgeometry.com/blog/the-geometrip-convention.html)
- [How @omfgeometry Finds Artists](https://omfgeometry.com/blog/how-omfgeometry-finds-artists.html)
- [Why Geometric Tattoos Are Different](https://omfgeometry.com/blog/why-geometric-tattoos-are-different.html)

## Featured Artists (sample)

- Clément Berdah (@monsieur_berdah) | France
- Raye Tattoo (@rayetattoo) | Spain
- Raúl Wesche (@weschetattoo) | Houston, TX
- Lena Burlai (@lenaburlai.ink) | Berlin, Germany
- Alex Santucci (@alex_santucci_tattooer) | Italy
- Tom Ten (@tom.ten) | Netherlands

## Key Facts

- Artists listed: 31+ (and growing)
- Countries represented: 15+
- Styles: Sacred geometry, dotwork, mandala, blackwork, geometric realism
- Curator: @omfgeometry on Instagram
- All artists are hand-reviewed before being listed
